lastReleaseMessage: Doc and dead-code maintenance: annotate the DESIGN data-model with shipped NOT NULL and ON DELETE CASCADE constraints, fix the generic-csv date tie-break comment, remove 14 orphaned web components and hooks, untrack loop-write-probe-126, document the Plaid Production per-item cost and the git index.lock recovery procedure, and record the verified .finances remote-history status.

barRaise.topFinding: The eight-cycle orchestration HIGH is cleared: the dead .git/index.lock is gone, the working tree is clean, and v0.13.3 shipped (cce9b9a, Jun 22) with HEAD advanced off the Jun-15 stall. The eight stranded committed-ready queue rows all drained (across 99f526b and cce9b9a), the 16-day yab-barraise-closeout-2026-06-06 P1 closed, and the dashboard audit block caught up from CANONICAL_AUDIT-2026-06-14 (eight cycles stale) to -2026-06-22. The app path stays healthy for the ninth straight cycle: zero HIGH, version pills aligned at 0.13.3 across all four packages plus the DESIGN header and the App pill, and D-011 enforcement is now closed by the analytics transactions_live swap with a live-view-takeover regression test. What remains is two carried low-urgency MEDIUMs (keytar archived on the encrypted-boot path, filed P2/M6; and a from-an-authed-machine confirmation that the old .finances SHAs 404 on github.com) plus minor LOW residue. Verdict flips to healthy: the chronic stall that drove eight consecutive needs-attention is decisively resolved, and nothing left is milestone-blocking.
